Nevada

S 128 

Health Care

Vetoed

Prohibits certain health insurers, including insurance for public employees, from solely using, employing or relying upon an AI system or an automated decision tool to, among other things, deny a request for prior authorization for medical or dental care; relates to plans of self insurance; encourages physicians, physician assistants, advanced practice registered nurses, and osteopathic physicians to inform patients of options related to donating, banking or storing stem cells.

Health Use

Nevada

S 174 

Pupils With Autism Spectrum Disorder

Failed

Relates to education; requires the board of trustees of each school district and the governing body of each charter school to develop a policy governing the provision of certain services to pupils with autism spectrum disorder, including using assistive technology tools like, AI; authorizes certain persons or governmental entities to request the Superintendent of Public Instruction to determine whether such policies comply with certain laws and regulations; revises the definition of the term "volunteer" as it relates to persons required to undergo certain.

Education Use; Education/Training

Nevada

S 186 

Use of AI In Health Care

Failed

Relates to health care; requires a medical facility or a provider of health care who uses generative AI to generate certain communications to ensure that those communications include certain information; provides other matters properly relating thereto; closes title an act relating to health care; requires a medical facility or a provider of health care who uses generative AI to generate certain communications to ensure that those communications include certain.

Health Use; Government Use; Private Sector Use

Nevada

S 199 

AI Systems

Failed

Relates to AI systems; provides for the registration and regulation of AI companies by the Bureau of Consumer Protection in the Office of the Attorney General; imposes certain requirements and restrictions upon certain persons engaged in certain activities relating to AI systems; requires the Department of Employment, Training and Rehabilitation to collect and report certain information relating to AI systems.

Private Sector Use; Oversight/Governance

Nevada

S 263 

Pornography Involving Minors

Enacted

Relates to crimes; expands certain prohibitions relating to pornography involving minors; revises the penalties for certain crimes relating to pornography involving minors; provides other matters properly relating thereto; closes title an act relating to crimes; expands certain prohibitions relating to pornography involving minors; revises the penalties for certain crimes relating to pornography involving minors; provides other matters properly relating thereto.

Child Pornography; Criminal Use

Nevada

S 398 

Certain Medical and Dental Care Authorization

Failed

Relates to insurance; revises provisions relating to prior authorization for certain medical and dental care; revises provisions relating to the coverage of autism spectrum disorders for certain persons; prohibits health insurers from considering the availability of certain public benefits for certain purposes; provides other matters properly relating thereto; closes title an act relating to insurance; revises provisions relating to prior authorization for certain medical and dental care.

Health Use; Private Sector Use; Oversight/Governance

New Hampshire

H 558 

Monthly Rent Charged by Landlords

Failed

Creates a public county registry of the monthly rent charged by landlords for each owned unit; prohibits landlords from using algorithms or software to determine rental rates; requires an affidavit attesting to compliance.

Housing; Responsible Use; Private Sector Use

New Hampshire

H 630 

Deepfake Materials of Political Candidates

Failed

Prevents the dissemination of deepfake materials of political candidates; provides that, with certain exceptions, a person, corporation, committee, or other entity shall not, within a specified number of days of an election at which a candidate for elective office will appear on the ballot, distribute a deepfake created using synthetic media technology that the person, corporation, committee or other entity knows or should have known is a deepfake of a candidate, election official, or party on the ballot.

Elections

New Hampshire

S 263 

Responsive Generative Communication

Pending

Criminalizes and creates a private right of action for the facilitation, encouragement, offer, solicitation, or recommendation of certain acts or actions through a responsive generative communication to a child.

Private Sector Use; Private Right of Action; Criminal Use

A 1781

Requires hospitals and nursing homes to provide access to certain interpreter services for deaf and hard of hearing. including, but not limited to, video remote interpreting services and AI-assisted interpreting services, as approved by the Commissioner of Health.

Pending

AI Advisory Council

Misuse of Personal Characteristics

Pending

A 4558 

AI Investments

Pending

Establishes Next New Jersey Program for AI investments.

Effect on Labor/Employment; Taxes; Private Sector Use

New Jersey

A 4639 

Boards of Education AI Policies

Pending

Provides that a board of education of a school district that utilizes a video surveillance system with AI capabilities shall be required to adopt a policy regarding the use of the system; provides that the policy shall, among other things, require the board to post signage in a prominent, public place in buildings and on school grounds where the surveillance system may be used; provides that the signage shall indicate that a surveillance system with AI capabilities is in use.

Education Use

New Jersey

A 4700 

State Budget

Enacted

Makes appropriations for the support of the State Government and the several public purposes for the fiscal year ending on the specified date; including funding for AI career and technical education expansion, AI innovation in education grants and  AI innovation challenge.

Appropriations; Education/Training; Education Use

New Jersey

A 4821 

State Generative AI Program

 

Pending

Requires Office of Information Technology to develop a state generative AI program and implement AI education courses with county governments; appropriates monies.

New Jersey

A 4872 

Rental Property Owners Competition Agreements

Pending

Prohibits certain coordination among residential rental property owners who restrict competition with respect to residential dwelling units; provides that it shall be unlawful and a violation of the New Jersey Antitrust Act for the owner of a coordinator, defined as a software, data analytics service, or entity that performs a coordinating function for any rental property owner, to facilitate an agreement among owners that restricts competition with respect to residential dwelling units.

Housing; Private Sector Use

New Jersey

A 4888 

AI and Labor Market Study Commission

Pending

Establishes the AI and Labor Market Study Commission in the Department of Labor and Workforce Development to analyze the impact of AI on the labor market; provides that the commission shall, among other things, identify high risk jobs, including those most likely to result in displacement due to AI; creates the Job Transition Fund to support displaced workers and enable transitions to new AI driven roles through education, training, State job training funds, and job placement services.

Studies; Effect on Labor/Employment; Oversight/Governance

A 4916 

Residential Dwelling Units Rent Price Setting

Pending

Prohibits use and sale of algorithmic devices for setting rent price or occupancy of residential dwelling units.

AI Apprenticeships

Pending

Pending

Urges Congress and President to enact Do Not Disturb Act.

 

New Jersey

AR 158 

Artificial Intelligence Companies Whistleblowers

Adopted

Urges generative AI companies to make voluntary commitments regarding employee whistleblower protections; urges generative AI companies to commit to the specified principles, including, among others, that the company shall not enter into or enforce any agreement prohibiting disparagement or criticism of the company for risk-related concerns or retaliate for risk-related criticism by hindering any vested economic benefit.

Private Sector Use; Effect on Labor/Employment

New Jersey

AR 188 

Energy Generation Emergency

Pending

Urges Governor to declare energy generation emergency in the state.

Energy

New Jersey

S 1438 

State Agencies Automated Systems Regulations

Pending

Concerns about regulation of automated systems and AI used by state agencies.

Government Use; Oversight/Governance; Studies

New Jersey

S 1588 

 

Use of Automated Tools in Hiring Decisions

Pending

Regulates use of automated tools in hiring decisions to minimize discrimination in employment.

Audit; Effect on Labor/Employment; Notification; Private Sector Use; Responsible Use

New Jersey

S 2025 

State Budget

Pending

Appropriates state funds and federal funds for the state budget for fiscal year 2025. Education appropriations for AI include K-12 AI Innovation in Education Grants and for AI career and technical education expansion.

Appropriations; Education/Training; Education Use

New Jersey

S 2026 

State Budget

Enacted

Makes appropriations for the support of the state government and several public purposes for the specified fiscal year; provides funding for, among other things, the Animal Health Diagnostic Laboratory Program; transfers a certain amount from the Department of Environmental Protections Water Resources Monitoring and Planning Constitutional Dedication Special Purpose Account for the Animal Waste Management portion of the Conservation Assistance Program in the Division of Agricultural and Natural Resources.

Education Use; Education/Training; Appropriations

New Jersey

S 2964 

Automated Employment Decision Tools Auditing

Pending

Creates standards for independent bias auditing of automated employment decision tools.

Audit; Government Use; Private Sector Use; Responsible Use; Effect on Labor/Employment

New Jersey

S 3015 

Use of AI Enabled Video Interviews

Pending

Regulates use of AI enabled video interview in hiring process.

Private Sector Use; Effect on Labor/Employment

New Jersey

S 3046 

Automation Job Loss Business and Income Tax Credit

Pending

Provides corporation business and gross income tax credit for employment of persons who have experienced job loss due to automation.

Effect on Labor/Employment; Taxes; Private Sector Use

New Jersey

S 3143 

Hospitals and Nursing Homes Interpreter Services

Pending

Requires hospitals and nursing homes to provide access to certain interpreter services for deaf and hard of hearing, including AI-assisted interpreting services.

Health Use

New Jersey

S 3225 

Businesses Text Based Chats Transcriptions

Pending

Requires business using text based chat to offer transcription of chat to consumer.

Private Sector Use

New Jersey

S 3298 

 

Health Insurers Data Collection

Pending

Requires collection of data by health insurers regarding health insurance claims and decisions made using automated utilization management systems.

Health Use; Private Sector Use

New Jersey

S 3357 

AI Advisory Council

Pending

Establishes the state AI Advisory Council.

Studies; Responsible Use; Oversight/Governance

New Jersey

S 3398 

Packaging and Paper Product Stewardship Act

Pending

Relates to the disposal of packaging and paper products; creates the Advisory Council on Solid Waste Management to research, review, advise, provide recommendations to the Commissioner of Conservation and Economic Development on any issues related to waste management, sustainable waste prevention, source reduction, reuse, and recycling practices; provides that no person shall sell, offer for sale, or offer for promotional purposes any package or packaging component which contains the specified substances.

Government Use; Studies

New Jersey

S 3432 

AI Investments

Enacted

Establishes Next New Jersey Program for AI investments; provides that the Economic Development Authority (EDA) would provide tax credits to eligible businesses, following approval of an application, to eligible AI businesses; provides that eligible AI businesses would include a business or division that is primarily engaged in the AI industry or large-scale AI data center industry.

Taxes; Energy; Private Sector Use

New Jersey

S 3612 

Women’s Health Research and Innovations

Pending

Requires the Department of Health to provide grants for womens health research and innovations.

Appropriations; Health Use

New Jersey

S 3657 

Residential Rentals Price and Supply Algorithm Use

Pending

Makes the use of algorithmic systems to influence price and supply of residential rental units unlawful.

Housing; Private Sector Use

New Jersey

S 3699 

Rental Property Owners Competition Agreements

Pending

Prohibits facilitation of agreements among rental property owners who restrict competition with respect to residential dwelling units.

Housing

New Jersey

S 3742 

AI Company Safety Tests

Pending

Requires AI companies to conduct safety tests and report results to Office of Information Technology.

Private Sector Use; Responsible Use; Impact Assessment 

New Jersey

S 3835 

Office of Cybersecurity Infrastructure

Pending

Establishes the Office of Cybersecurity Infrastructure; provides that the Director shall be appointed by the Governor with the advice and consent of the Senate, and shall be qualified by education, training, and prior experience to direct the work of the office and to perform the duties, functions and responsibilities of the position.

Government Use; Oversight/Governance

New Jersey

S 3865 

Rental Applications Credit Inquiries

Pending

Concerns credit inquiries for rental applications.

Housing; Private Sector Use

New Jersey

S 3871 

 

AI Apprenticeship Program

Pending

Establishes the AI Apprenticeship Program and AI Apprenticeship Tax Credit Program.

Education/Training; Effect on Labor/Employment; Taxes

New Jersey

S 3876 

School Districts AI Instruction

 

Pending

Requires school districts to provide instruction on AI; requires the Secretary of Higher Education to develop AI model curricula.

Education Use; Education/Training

New Jersey

S 3984 

AI Job Training

Pending

Establishes public-private partnerships to develop AI job training.

Education Use; Education/Training; Effect on Labor/Employment

New Jersey

S 4100 

Construction Applications Automated Platform

Pending

Requires establishment of automated platform to expedite construction code approval of applications to install residential solar energy systems.

Energy; Oversight/Governance

New Jersey

S 4119 

County Colleges Neurodiverse Students Support

Pending

Establishes various programs to support neurodiverse students at county colleges; appropriates monies.

Appropriations; Education Use; Education/Training; Effect on Labor/Employment

New Jersey

S 4120 

Neurodiverse Individuals Employment Tax Credits

Pending

Provides corporation business tax credits and gross income tax credits to businesses employing and retaining certain neurodiverse individuals.

Taxes; Effect on Labor/Employment; Education/Training; Education Use

New Jersey

S 4135 

Higher Education Redevelopment Projects

Pending

Provides allowance for certain redevelopment projects undertaken by institutions of higher education under New Jersey Aspire program.

Education Use; Education/Training; Appropriations

New Jersey

S 4143 

AI Data Centers Energy Usage Plans

Pending

Requires submission of energy usage plan to Board of Public Utilities for proposed AI data centers; requires all electricity for AI data centers to be derived from new clean energy sources.

Energy; Private Sector Use

New Jersey

S 4253 

AI Innovation Partnership

Pending

Establishes AI Innovation Partnership; provides funding for certain nonprofit partnerships to promote certain emerging technology businesses.

New Jersey

S 4463 

Artificial Intelligence Systems Health Advertising

Pending

Prohibits advertising AI system as licensed mental health professional.

New Jersey

SJR 114 

Do Not Disturb Act

Pending

Urges Congress and President to enact Do Not Disturb Act.

 

New Jersey

SR 121 

AI Whistleblower Protections

Pending

Urges generative AI companies to make voluntary commitments regarding employee whistleblower protections.

SR 132 

State Energy Generation Emergency

Pending

Urges governor to declare energy generation emergency in the state.

Energy

New Mexico

H 20 

Technology and Innovation Division

Enacted

Relates to economic development; creates the technology and innovation division within the economic development department; provides powers and duties; creates the technology and innovation network advisory board; enacts the research, development and deployment fund act; creates the research, development and deployment fund; provides for match funding for certain projects that promote certain goals; establishes an application process, eligibility requirements and award terms; requires reporting.

Private Sector Use; Government Use; Studies; Effect on Labor/Employment

New Mexico

H 60 

AI Act

Failed - Adjourned

Relates to AI; enacts the AI Act; requires notice of use, documentation of systems, disclosure of algorithmic discrimination risk and risk incidents; requires risk management policies and impact assessments; provides for enforcement by the State Department of Justice and for civil actions by consumers for injunctive or declaratory relief.

Responsible Use; Private Sector Use; Notification; Impact Assessment; Audit; Cybersecurity

New Mexico

H 178 

Nursing Practice Changes

Enacted

Relates to health; amends sections of the nursing practice act to clarify the scope of practice for different categories of licensed nurses regarding the administration of general anesthesia, anesthetics and sedatives; makes changes to the licensing process; expanding the powers and duties of the board of nursing; modifies the administration of certain disciplinary processes; requires the confidentiality of communications relating to potential disciplinary actions.

Health Use; Government Use; Private Sector Use

New Mexico

H 215 

No Use of AI for Rent Manipulation

Failed - Adjourned

Relates to property; enacts a new section of the uniform owner-resident relations act; prohibits the use of AI to manipulate rent pricing.

Housing; Private Sector Use; Responsible Use

New Mexico

H 221 

Voice and Visual Likeness Rights Act

Failed - Adjourned

Relates to intellectual property; enacts the voice and visual likeness rights act; provides for private enforcement; prescribes civil remedies.

Private Right of Action; Private Sector Use; Criminal Use

New Mexico

H 401 

Synthetic Content Accountability Act

Failed - Adjourned

Relates to AI synthetic content accountability act.

Private Sector Use; Criminal Use; Notification; Responsible Use; Cybersecurity

New Mexico

H 410 

Consumer Info and Data Protection Act

Failed - Adjourned

Relates to data; enacts the consumer information and data protection act; provides processes for the collection and protection of data; provides duties; provides exceptions; provides investigative authority; provides civil penalties.

Private Sector Use

New Mexico

HJM 9 

AI Interim Committee

Failed - Adjourned

Relates to AI interim committee.

Studies

New Mexico

HM 2 

AI Work Group

Adopted

Relates to Legislative Education Study Committee AI work group.

HM 18 

Certified Public Accountant Workforce Crisis Solutions

Failed - Adjourned

Relates to Certified Public Accountant workforce crisis solutions.

HM 54 

Study Public School Safety

Failed - Adjourned

S 85 

Campaign Finance Changes

Failed - Adjourned

New Mexico

S 142 

Grid Modernization Roadmap

Vetoed

Relates to grid modernization roadmap.

Private Sector Use; Energy

New York

A 222 

Chatbots and Misleading or Harmful Information

Pending

Imposes liability for misleading, incorrect, contradictory or harmful information to a user by a chatbot that results in financial loss or other demonstrable harm.

Notification; Responsible Use; Private Sector Use

New York

A 235 

AI System

Pending

Requires the owner, licensee or operator of a visual or audio generative AI system to take steps to prohibit its users from creating unauthorized realistic depictions of public officials.

Criminal Use; Private Sector Use

New York

A 399 

Robotic Device

Pending

Prohibits the manufacture, modification, sale, transfer, equipping, use, or operation of a robotic device or an uncrewed aircraft equipped or mounted with a weapon within the state.

Criminal Use; Responsible Use; Government Use

New York

A 433 

Automated Employment Decision Making Tools

Pending

Relates to the disclosure of automated employment decision-making tools; requires the office of information technology services to maintain an AI inventory; provides that the use of AI systems shall not affect the existing rights of employees pursuant to an existing collective bargaining agreement, or the existing representational relationships among employee organizations or the bargaining relationships between the employer and an employee organization.

Effect on Labor/Employment; Government Use; Impact Assessment 

New York

A 606 

 

Use of a Synthetic Performer

Pending

Requires advertisements to disclose the use of a synthetic performer; imposes a specified amount of civil penalty for a first violation and a specified amount penalty for any subsequent violation.

Private Sector Use; Responsible Use

New York

A 768 

AI Consumer Protection Act

Pending

Enacts the "New York AI consumer protection act", in relation to preventing the use of AI algorithms to discriminate against protected classes.

Private Sector Use; Responsible Use; Cybersecurity; Criminal Use

New York

A 773 

Use of Automated Decision Tools by Banks

Pending

Relates to the use of automated lending decision-making tools to make lending decisions.

Private Sector Use

New York

A 1071 

Reckless Promotion of Unlawful or False Material

Pending

Prohibits the knowing and reckless promotion of unlawful or false material; provides remedies for the violation of such prohibition.

Criminal Use; Private Right of Action; Private Sector Use

New York

A 1205 

Chief AI Officer

Pending

Establishes the position of chief AI officer and such person's functions, powers and duties; includes, but not limited to, developing statewide AI policies and governance, coordinating the activities of any and all state departments, boards, commissions, agencies and authorities performing any functions using AI tools; makes related provisions.

Government Use; Oversight/Governance

New York

A 1273 

Motor Vehicle Insurers Discrimination

Pending

Prohibits motor vehicle insurers from discrimination on the basis of socioeconomic factors in determining algorithms used to construct actuarial tables, coverage terms, premiums and/or rates.

Private Sector Use; Responsible Use

New York

A 1280 

Unlawful Dissemination of Fabricated Images or Audio

Pending

Establishes the crime of unlawful dissemination or publication of a fabricated photographic, videographic, or audio record as a class E felony.

Criminal Use; Education Use; Private Sector Use

New York

A 1332 

State Office of Algorithmic Innovation

Pending

Creates a state office of algorithmic innovation to set policies and standards to ensure algorithms are safe, effective, fair, and ethical, and that the state is conducive to promoting algorithmic innovation.

Government Use; Appropriations; Oversight/Governance

New York

A 1338 

Artificial Intelligence

Pending

Sets rules and procedures for the admissibility of evidence created or processed by AI.

Judicial Use

New York

A 1342 

Advanced AI Systems

Pending

Requires the collection of oaths of responsible use from users of certain generative or surveillance advanced AI systems by the operators of such systems, and transmission of such oaths to the attorney general.

Responsible Use; Criminal Use; Private Sector Use

New York

A 1415 

Privacy Standards for Electronic Health Products

Pending

Creates privacy standards for electronic health products and services; requires consent to be given for the collection and/or sharing of personal health information or other personal data.

Health Use; Private Sector Use

New York

A 1417 

Landlords

Pending

Amends the general business law, in relation to prohibiting the use of algorithmic pricing by a landlord for the purpose of determining the amount of rent to charge a residential tenant.

Housing; Private Sector Use; Responsible Use

New York

A 1456 

Insurer Notice Requirements

Pending

Provides for notice requirements where an insurer authorized to write accident and health insurance in this state, a corporation organized pursuant to article forty-three of this chapter, or a health maintenance organization certified pursuant to article forty-four of the public health law uses AI-based algorithms in the utilization review process.

Health Use; Provenance; Notification

New York

A 1509 

Publishers of Books Created by AI

Pending

Requires publishers of books created wholly or partially with the use of generative AI to disclose such use of generative AI before the completion of such sale; applies to all printed and digital books consisting of text, pictures, audio, puzzles, games or any combination thereof.

Notification; Private Sector Use

New York

A 1952 

Employers and Employment Agencies

Pending

Requires employers and employment agencies to notify candidates for employment if machine learning technology is used to make hiring decisions prior to the use of such technology.

Effect on Labor/Employment; Notification; Government Use

New York

A 2249 

Model Management Group

Enacted

Amends the Labor Law; relates to model management companies and model management groups; relates to the state Fashion Workers Act; provides that a model management company or model management group shall not engage in business in the state or enter into any arrangement with a client or model for the purpose of providing model management company or model management group services in the state unless the model management company or model management group is registered; provides for exceptions.

Private Sector Use; Criminal Use

New York

A 3000 

State Operations Budget

Enacted

Makes appropriations for the support of government and state operations budget. Includes AI appropriations.

Education Use; Education/Training; Appropriations

New York

A 3006 

Education, Labor, Housing and Family Assistance Budget

Pending

Enacts into law major components of legislation necessary to implement the state education, labor, housing and family assistance budget for the state for specified fiscal year; relates to contracts for excellence; relates to calculation of state aid to school districts; relates to a statewide dual enrollment policy; extends workforce education; relates to maximum class sizes for special education; extends chapter 82 of the laws of 1995; relates to foundation aid.

Education/Training; Appropriations

New York

A 3008 

Transportation and Economic Development Budget

Pending

Enacts into law major components of legislation necessary; implements the state transportation, economic development and environmental conservation budget for the 2025-2026 state fiscal year; relates to the waterfront commission act; makes amendments; changes "applicant" to licensee or registrant.

Responsible Use; Private Sector Use; Private Right of Action; Appropriations

New York

A 3071 

Five Year Dental Health Demonstration Project

Pending

Establishes a five-year dental health demonstration project in the county of Monroe for the purpose of reimbursement to providers for eligible dental diagnostic services for certain eligible populations, including clinical diagnostic services facilitated by AI to treat existing dental problems

Health Use; Appropriations

New York

A 3125 

Use of Automated Decision Tools by Landlords

Pending

Relates to the use of automated housing decision making tools to make housing decisions.

Housing; Responsible Use; Private Sector Use; Criminal Use

New York

A 3265 

New York AI Bill of Rights

Pending

Enacts the New York AI bill of rights to provide residents of the state with rights and protections to ensure that any system making decisions without human intervention impacting their lives do so lawfully, properly, and with meaningful oversight.

Responsible Use; Private Sector Use; Government Use

New York

A 3327 

Political Communication Requirement

Pending

Requires any political communication, whether made by phone call, email or other message-based communication, that utilizes an AI system to engage in human-like conversation with another shall, by reasonable means, apprise the person of the fact that they are communicating with an AI system.

Elections

New York

A 3356 

Advanced AI Licensing Act

Pending

Enacts the "advanced AI licensing act"; provides for regulation of advanced AI systems (Part A); requires registration and licensing of high-risk advanced AI systems and related provisions regarding the operation of such systems (Part B); establishes the advanced AI ethical code of conduct (Part C); prohibits the development and operation of certain AI systems (Part D).

Private Sector Use; Responsible Use; Oversight/Governance; Criminal Use; Impact Assessment 

New York

A 3361 

Commission to Study AI

Pending

Creates a temporary state commission to study and investigate how to regulate AI, robotics and automation; repeals such commission.

Studies; Oversight/Governance

New York

A 3411 

Owner or Operator of a Generative AI System

Pending

Requires the owner, licensee or operator of a generative AI system to conspicuously display a warning on the system's user interface that is reasonably calculated to consistently apprise the user that the outputs of the generative AI system may be inaccurate and/or inappropriate.

Responsible Use; Notification

New York

A 3437 

Food Service Establishments

Pending

Prohibits food service establishments from using a dynamic pricing model in determining the prices on its menu; requires fixed prices be published on a food service establishment's menu.

Private Sector Use

New York

A 3719 

Tax on Business-Induced Job Displacement

Pending

Imposes a tax on certain businesses when people are displaced from their employment due to certain technologies based on the sum of any taxes or fees imposed by the state or any political subdivision thereof computed based on a displaced employee's wage.

Taxes; Effect on Labor/Employment; Private Sector Use

New York

A 3779 

Regulation of AI in Hiring Decisions

Pending

Restricts the use by an employer or an employment agency of electronic monitoring or an automated employment decision tool; screens a candidate or employee for an employment decision unless such tool has been the subject of an impact assessment within the last year; requires notice to employment candidates of the use of such tools; provides remedies for violations.

Impact Assessment; Effect on Labor/Employment; Private Sector Use

New York

A 3914 

Automated Hiring Decision Tool Regulation

Pending

Establishes criteria for the use of automated employment decision tools; provides for enforcement for violations of such criteria.

Effect on Labor/Employment; Criminal Use; Private Sector Use

New York

A 3924 

Privacy Rights Involving Digitization

Pending

Relates to privacy rights involving digitization; provides that such right of privacy and action for injunction and damages shall include a portrait, picture, likeness or voice created or altered by digitization.

Private Sector Use; Criminal Use

New York

A 3930 

Use of AI in Rental Housing and Loan Decisions

Pending

Regulates the use of AI in aiding decisions on rental housing and loans; requires a study on the impact of AI and machine learning on housing discrimination and redlining.

Housing; Private Sector Use; Responsible Use

New York

A 3932 

Third Party Food Delivery Platforms

Pending

Prohibits third-party food delivery platforms from employing algorithms that promote unsafe operation of e-bikes and scooters to improve safety for third-party food deliveries.

Private Sector Use; Audit

New York

A 3969 

Commission on Forensic Science

Pending

Updates the membership, powers, duties and procedures of the commission on forensic science; establishes the scientific advisory committee, the social justice, ethics, and equity assessment committee and the forensic analyst license advisory committee; makes conforming changes.

Responsible Use; Studies; Judicial Use; Government Use

New York

A 3991 

Requirements for the Use of AI

Pending

Establishes requirements for the use of AI, algorithm, or other software tools in utilization review and management; defines AI.

Health Use; Private Sector Use

New York

A 3993 

Discrimination Through the Use of Clinical Algorithms

Pending

Prohibits discrimination through the use of clinical algorithms; provides exceptions for clinical algorithms that rely on variables to appropriately make decisions; includes to identify, evaluate, and address health disparities.

Responsible Use; Health Use; Private Sector Use

New York

A 4002 

Discriminatory Advertisement Practices in Housing

Pending

Prohibits discriminatory advertisement practices in relation to the sale or renting of housing; allows for the division of human rights to investigate such occurrences.

Housing; Responsible Use; Private Sector Use

New York

A 4427 

Use of External Consumer Data and Information Sources

Pending

Prohibits the use of external consumer data and information sources being used when determining insurance rates; provides that no insurer shall unfairly discriminate based on race, color, national or ethnic origin, religion, sex, sexual orientation, disability, gender identity, or gender expression, or use any external consumer data and information sources, as well as any algorithms or predictive models that use external consumer data and information sources, in a way that unfairly discriminates based on.

Private Sector Use; Responsible Use

New York

A 4550 

Department of Labor

Pending

Requires the Department of Labor to study the long-term impact of AI on the state workforce including but not limited to on job performance, productivity, training, education requirements, privacy and security; prohibits any state entity from using AI in any way that would displace any natural person from their employment with such state entity until the department's final report is received.

Effect on Labor/Employment; Studies; Government Use

New York

A 4947 

NY Privacy Act

Pending

Enacts the NY privacy act to require companies to disclose their methods of de-identifying personal information, to place special safeguards around data sharing and to allow consumers to obtain the Names of all entities with whom their information is shared.

Private Sector Use; Impact Assessment; Audit; Private Right of Action

New York

A 4970 

School Safety Planning and Training

Pending

Relates to classroom safety mechanisms, emergency medical equipment, and evidence-based best practices for school safety planning and training.

Education Use; Government Use

New York

A 4987 

New York Veteran Digital Navigator Program Act

Pending

Enacts the State Veteran Digital Navigator Program Act; requires the state commissioner of the Department of Veterans' Services; establishes a program; promotes digital citizenship, through which the state commissioner shall award grants to eligible entities.

Education/Training

New York

A 4991 

Use of Algorithmic Devices by Landlords

Pending

Prohibits the use of an algorithmic device by a landlord for the purpose of determining the amount of rent to charge a residential tenant; declares that such use is an unfair or deceptive trade practice.

Housing; Private Sector Use

New York

A 5216 

State Units

Pending

Requires state units to purchase a product or service that is or contains an algorithmic decision system that adheres to responsible AI standards; specifies content included in responsible AI standards; requires the commissioner of taxation and finance to adopt certain regulations; alters the definition of unlawful discriminatory practice to include acts performed through algorithmic decision systems.

Government Use; Studies; Impact Assessment; Responsible Use

New York

A 5429 

New York Workforce Stabilization Act

Pending

Relates to requiring certain businesses to conduct AI impact assessments; amends the tax law, in relation to establishing a surcharge on certain corporations that use AI or data mining or have greater than a threshold number of employees displaced by AI.

Impact Assessment ; Effect on Labor/Employment; Private Sector Use

New York

A 5689 

Computer Science Course Requirement

Pending

Creates a computer science course requirement for graduation from high school; directs the Department of Education to design and implement such program.

Education Use; Education/Training

New York

A 5827 

Consumers' Foundational Data Privacy Rights

Pending

Establishes Consumers' Foundational Data Privacy Rights; creates oversight mechanisms; establishes enforcement mechanisms; establishes the Privacy and Security Victims' Relief Fund.

Responsible Use; Private Sector Use

New York

A 6030 

Interactive Poker Games

Pending

Allows certain interactive poker games be considered games of skill rather than games of luck; includes definitions, authorization, required safeguards and minimum standards, the scope of licensing review and state tax implications; makes corresponding penal law amendments.

Private Sector Use; Oversight/Governance

New York

A 6180 

Production Using AI

Pending

Excludes a production using AI or autonomous vehicles in a manner which results in the displacement of employees whose salaries are qualified expenses from the definition of qualified film for the purposes of the empire state film production credit.

Effect on Labor/Employment; Private Sector Use

New York

A 6453 

AI Frontier Models

Pending

Relates to the training and use of AI frontier models; provides that, before deploying a frontier model, the large developer of such model shall, among other things, implement a written safety and security protocol, grant the Division of Homeland Security and Emergency Services or the Attorney General access t the safety and security protocol, and implement appropriate safeguards to prevent unreasonable risk of critical harm; provides for civil actions and penalties for violations.

Provenance; Criminal Use; Cybersecurity; Oversight/Governance; Responsible Use

New York

A 6491 

Creation and Dissemination of Synthetic Media

Pending

Prohibits the creation and dissemination of synthetic media within a specified number of days of an election with intent to unduly influence the outcome of an election; makes such act a class E felony.

Elections; Criminal Use

New York

A 6540 

Generative Artificial Intelligence Providers

Pending

Requiring synthetic content creations system providers to include provenance data on synthetic content produced or modified by a synthetic content creations system that the synthetic content creations system provider makes available.

Provenance; Criminal Use; Government Use

New York

A 6544 

Third Party Food Delivery Services

Pending

Requires delivery businesses to factor compliance with certain vehicle and traffic laws when assigning workers to deliver items; provides that third-party food delivery service shall ensure that, when assigning delivery routes to workers involving the operation by a worker of a bicycle with or without electric assist, such assignments of delivery routes shall consider the worker's history of compliance with the following provisions of law, if data that allows the third-party food delivery service.

Private Sector Use; Effect on Labor/Employment

New York

A 6545 

Liability for Damages Caused by Chatbot

Pending

Imposes liability for damages caused by a chatbot impersonating licensed professionals or giving any medical or psychological advice.

Criminal Use; Private Sector Use

New York

A 6578 

AI Training Data Transparency Act

Pending

Establishes the AI training data transparency act requiring developers of generative AI models or services to post on the developer's website information regarding the data used by the developer to train the generative AI model or service, including a high-level summary of the datasets used in the development of such system or service.

Provenance; Effect on Labor/Employment; Private Sector Use

New York

A 6765 

Algorithmic Pricing

Pending

Relates to algorithmic pricing; defines terms.

Private Sector Use; Notification

New York

A 6767 

Provision of an AI Companion

Pending

Prohibits the provision of an AI companion to a user unless such AI companion contains a protocol for addressing possible suicidal ideation or self-harm expressed by a user, possible physical harm to others expressed by a user, and possible financial harm to others expressed by a user; requires certain notifications to certain users regarding crisis service providers and the non-human nature of such companion models.

Private Sector Use; Notification; Criminal Use

New York

A 6874 

AI Literacy Act

Pending

Establishes the AI Literacy Act which establishes an AI literacy in the digital equity competitive grant program.

Appropriations; Education Use

New York

A 6972 

AI Working Group

Pending

Creates an AI working group within the department of education for the purpose of developing guidance and a model policy on the safe and effective use of AI in ways that benefit, and do not harm, pupils and educators.

Education Use; Studies

New York

A 6974 

Stop Addictive Feeds Exploitation for All Act

Pending

Enacts the Stop Addictive Feeds Exploitation for All Act; requires a setting which allows a social media user to turn off algorithmic recommendations and other notifications; prohibits the use of dark patterns to subvert choice or inhibit users from accessing certain mechanisms.

Private Sector Use

New York

A 7029 

Commissioner of Education

Pending

Directs the commissioner of education to make recommendations to the board of regents regarding the incorporation of instruction in AI system literacy into the school curriculum at the elementary, junior high and senior high levels; directs the board of regents to adopt guidelines if the curriculum is adopted.

Education Use; Education/Training

New York

A 7172 

Division of Criminal Justice Services

Pending

Requires the division of criminal justice services to formulate a protocol for the regulation of the use of AI and facial recognition technology in criminal investigations; restricts the use of AI-generated outputs in court.

Government Use; Judicial Use

New York

A 7278 

State Agencies and State Owned Entities

Pending

Prohibits state agencies and state-owned entities from utilizing large language models or any AI systems to make decisions that affect individuals' rights, benefits, or services; requires such decisions to be made by human personnel of the respective state agency or state-owned entity; provides exceptions; provides for enforcement.

Government Use

New York

A 7305 

Penalties for Insurance Fraud

 

 

Pending

Relates to increasing penalties for insurance fraud, mandating investigations, and enhancing accountability for state agencies and offices responsible for insurance fraud prevention.

Studies; Government Use

New York

A 7611 

State Digital Government Modernization Act

Pending

Enacts the State Digital Government Modernization Act; establishes the digital government modernization initiative and the digital government enhancements pilot program.

Government Use

New York

A 7656 

Political Communication Created With Generative AI

Pending

Prohibits political communication containing any photo, video or audio depiction of a candidate created in whole or in part through the use of generative AI.

Elections

New York

A 8022 

Operator of a Covered Platform

Pending

Requires an operator of a covered platform with at least 1 million users to ensure that its covered platform provides a process to allow law enforcement agencies to contact such covered platform, which shall include making available a staffed hotline for the purposes of receiving and responding to questions about search warrants, acknowledging receipt of search warrants; provides status updates on warrant compliance, and which shall provide continuous availability of such process.

Private Sector Use; Criminal Use; Government Use; Judicial Use

New York

A 8295 

Automated Decision Making by Government Agencies

Pending

Provides that any state agency that utilizes an automated decision-making tool shall publish a list of such automated decision making tools on such state agency's website; provides that such disclosure shall include, among other things, a description of the automated decision making tool utilized by such state agency; requires agencies to conduct impact assessments; provides that the Office of Information Technology Services shall maintain an inventory of state automated decision making tools.

Government Use

New York

A 8523 

Political Communications

Pending

Requires certain political communications to include provenance data for all audios, images or videos used in such communications; provides for the repeal of certain provisions upon the expiration thereof.

Provenance; Elections

New York

A 8546 

Certification of Filings Produced Using Generative AI

Pending

Amends the Civil Practice Law & Rules Law; requires certification of filings produced using generative AI; requires the brief of an appellant to contain a disclosure of the use of generative AI in the drafting of the brief and certification that the content therein was reviewed and verified by a human.

Judicial Use

New York

A 8556 

Requirements and Safeguards for Use of AI Software

Pending

Prescribes requirements and safeguards for the use of an AI, algorithm, or other software tool for the purpose of utilization review for health and accident insurance.

Private Sector Use; Notification; Responsible Use

New York

A 8595 

Artificial Intelligence Transparency for Journalism Act

Pending

Enacts the State AI transparency for journalism act; requires developers of generative AI systems or services to post certain information on the developer's website regarding video, audio, text and data from a covered publication used to train the generative AI system or service; grants journalism providers authority to request a subpoena requiring developers to comply with posting such information.

Private Sector Use; Notification; Responsible Use

New York

A 8704 

State Opportunity Promise Scholarship

Pending

Expands the state opportunity promise scholarship to include all SUNY and CUNY approved programs which award certain associate's degrees.

Education Use; Education/Training

New York

A 8833 

Understanding Artificial Intelligence Responsibility Ac

Pending

Establishes understanding AI responsibility act requiring developers of covered models to be strictly liable for certain injuries.

Private Sector Use

New York

A 8843 

State Opportunity Promise Scholarship

Pending

Removes the requirement that an applicant for the State opportunity promise scholarship to have has not already obtained any postsecondary degree.

Education Use; Education/Training

New York

A 8884 

Development and Use of Artificial Intelligence Systems

Pending

Regulates the development and use of certain AI systems to prevent algorithmic discrimination; requires independent audits of high risk ai systems; provides for enforcement by the attorney general as well as a private right of action.

Audit; Private Sector Use; Responsible Use; Impact Assessment; Private Right of Action; Criminal Use

New York

A 8887 

Disclosure of Use of Synthetic Performer in Ads

Pending

Relates to requiring advertisements to disclose the use of a synthetic performer.

Notification; Private Sector Use

New York

S 185 

Automated Employment Decision Tools

Pending

Amends the labor law, in relation to restricting the use of electronic monitoring and automated employment decision tools and to amend the civil rights law, in relation to making a conforming change.

Effect on Labor/Employment; Private Sector Use; Impact Assessment; Private Right of Action

New York

S 463 

Promotion of Unlawful Material

Pending

Prohibits the knowing and reckless promotion of unlawful or false material; provides remedies for the violation of such prohibition.

Criminal Use; Private Right of Action; Private Sector Use

New York

S 822 

Automated Employment Decision Making Tools

Enacted

Relates to automated decision making by state agencies; relates to impact assessments and the submission of certain reports; provides that any State agency that utilizes an automated employment decision making tool shall publish a list of such tools on such agency’s website; provides that the use of AI systems shall not affect the existing rights of employees pursuant to an existing collective bargaining agreement; relates to maintaining an AI inventory.

Effect on Labor/Employment; Government Use; Impact Assessment 

New York

S 823 

Model Management Group

Pending

Defines model management group; provides for the registration process for model management groups; provides for exemption from registration requirements for model management companies and groups.

Private Sector Use; Criminal Use

New York

S 933 

Position of Chief AI Officer

Pending

Establishes the position of chief AI officer and such person's functions, powers and duties; including, but not limited to, developing statewide AI policies and governance, coordinating the activities of any and all state departments, boards, commissions, agencies and authorities performing any functions using AI tools; makes related provisions.

Government Use; Oversight/Governance; Studies

New York

S 934 

Owner of Generative AI System

Pending

Requires notices on generative AI systems; provides the owner, licensee or operator of a generative AI system shall clearly and conspicuously display a notice on the system's user interface that the outputs of the generative AI system may be inaccurate.

Private Sector Use; Notification

New York

S 1169 

Development and Use of AI Systems

Pending

Regulates the development and use of certain AI systems to prevent algorithmic discrimination; requires independent audits of high risk ai systems; provides for enforcement by the attorney general as well as a private right of action.

Private Right of Action; Responsible Use; Audit

New York

S 1228 

Advertisements

Pending

Requires advertisements to disclose the use of a synthetic performer; imposes a specified dollar civil penalty for a first violation and a specified dollar penalty for any subsequent violation.

Notification; Private Sector Use; Criminal Use

New York

S 1274 

Commission on Forensic Science

Pending

Updates the membership, powers, duties and procedures of the commission on forensic science; establishes the scientific advisory committee, the social justice, ethics, and equity assessment committee and the forensic analyst license advisory committee; makes conforming changes.

Studies; Responsible Use; Judicial Use; Government Use

New York

S 1573 

Collecting of Information for Rental Pricing

Pending

Prohibits the collecting of information of historical or contemporaneous prices, supply levels, or lease or rental contract termination and renewal dates of residential dwelling units from two or more rental property owners for purposes of analyzing or processing of such information using an algorithm and of recommending rental prices, lease renewal terms, or ideal occupancy levels to a rental property owner.

Housing; Private Sector Use; Responsible Use

New York

S 1815 

Publishers of Books Created With AI

Pending

Requires publishers of books created wholly or partially with the use of generative AI to disclose such use of generative AI before the completion of such sale; applies to all printed and digital books consisting of text, pictures, audio, puzzles, games or any combination thereof.

Notification; Private Sector Use

New York

S 1854 

New York Workforce Stabilization Act

Pending

Establishes the New York Workforce Stabilization Act; requires certain businesses to conduct AI impact assessments on the application and use of such AI and to submit such impact assessments to the Department of Labor prior to the implementation of the AI; establishes a surcharge on certain corporations that use AI or data mining or have greater than fifteen employees displaced by AI.

Effect on Labor/Employment; Taxes; Impact Assessment 

New York

S 1962 

NY AI Consumer Protection Act

Pending

Enacts the "New York AI consumer protection act", in relation to preventing the use of AI algorithms to discriminate against protected classes.

Responsible Use; Private Sector Use; Impact Assessment; Audit; Criminal Use

New York

S 2414 

Political AI Disclaimer Act

Pending

Enacts the "Political AI Disclaimer (PAID) act"; requires political communications that use synthetic media to disclose that they were created with the assistance of AI; requires committees that use synthetic media to maintain records of such usage.

Elections; Notification; Criminal Use

New York

S 2487 

New York AI Ethics Commission

Pending

Establishes the New York AI ethics commission.

Government Use; Studies; Oversight/Governance; Impact Assessment 

New York

S 2697 

Use of an Algorithmic Device by a Landlord

Pending

Prohibits the use of an algorithmic device by a landlord for the purpose of determining the amount of rent to charge a residential tenant; declares that such use is an unfair or deceptive trade practice.

Housing; Private Sector Use

New York

S 2698 

Certification of Filings Produced Using Generative AI

Pending

Amends the Civil Practice Law & Rules Law; requires certification of filings produced using generative AI; requires the brief of an appellant to contain a disclosure of the use of generative AI in the drafting of the brief and certification that the content therein was reviewed and verified by a human.

Judicial Use; Notification

New York

S 3006 

Education, Labor, Housing and Family Assistance Budget

Enacted

Enacts into law major components of legislation necessary to implement the state education, labor, housing and family assistance budget for the state fiscal year; relates to contracts for excellence; calculation of state aid to school districts; relates to a statewide dual enrollment policy; extends workforce education; relates to maximum class sizes for special education; extends chapter of the laws of 1995; relates to foundation aid.

Education Use; Education/Training

New York

S 3008 

Transportation and Economic Development Budget

Enacted

Enacts into law major components of legislation necessary; implements the state transportation, economic development and environmental conservation budget for the 2025-2026 state fiscal year; relates to the waterfront commission act; makes amendments; changes "applicant" to licensee or registrant.

Private Sector Use; Notification; Appropriations; Criminal Use

New York

S 3133 

Robotic Device or Uncrewed Aircraft with a Weapon

Pending

Prohibits the manufacture, modification, sale, transfer, equipping, use, or operation of a robotic device or an uncrewed aircraft equipped or mounted with a weapon within the state.

Criminal Use; Government Use; Private Sector Use

New York

S 3202 

Sexually Explicit Depictions of Children

Pending

Prohibits accessing or distributing certain sexually explicit depictions of children; prohibits consent to such depictions by anyone under eighteen years of age; makes such crimes eligible for bail; includes certain crimes as sex offenses.

Child Pornography; Criminal Use

New York

S 3243 

Five Year Dental Health Demonstration Project

Pending

Establishes a five-year dental health demonstration project in the county of Monroe for the purpose of providing reimbursements to providers for eligible dental diagnostic services for certain eligible populations, including services facilitated by AI to treat existing dental problems.

Health Use; Appropriations

New York

S 4082 

Motor Vehicle Insurers

Pending

Prohibits motor vehicle insurers from discrimination on the basis of socioeconomic factors in determining algorithms used to construct actuarial tables, coverage terms, premiums and/or rates.

Private Sector Use; Responsible Use

New York

S 4394 

Use of Automated Employment Decision Tools

Pending

Establishes criteria for the use of automated employment decision tools; provides for enforcement for violations of such criteria.

Effect on Labor/Employment; Impact Assessment; Criminal Use

New York

S 5267 

Property and Casualty Insurers

Pending

Prohibits property/casualty insurers from discriminating based on race, color, creed, national origin, disability, age, marital status, sex, sexual orientation, education background or educational level attained, employment status or occupation, income level, consumer credit information or score, ownership or interest in real property, location, type of residence, including but not limited to single-family home, multi-family home, apartment, housing subsidized by state and/or federal programs.

Private Sector Use; Responsible Use

New York

S 5486 

Disclosures by Automobile Insurers

Pending

Requires certain disclosures by automobile insurers relating to the use of telematics systems in determining insurance rates or discounts.

Private Sector Use; Responsible Use

New York

S 5668 

Liability for Harmful Information from Chatbot

Pending

Imposes liability for misleading, incorrect, contradictory or harmful information to a user by a chatbot that results in financial loss or other demonstrable harm.

Private Sector Use; Criminal Use

New York

S 6270 

Third Party Food Delivery Services

Pending

Requires third-party food delivery services to factor compliance with certain vehicle and traffic Laws when assigning workers to delivery routes when such delivery may involve the operation of a bicycle with or without electric assist.

Private Sector Use

New York

S 6278 

Aggravated Harassment by Means of Digital Communication

Pending

Establishes the crime of aggravated harassment by means of electronic or digital communication; provides for a private right of action for the unlawful dissemination or publication of deep fakes, which are digitized images which are altered to incorporate a person's face or their identifiable body part onto an image and such image depicts a pornographic or lewd sex act or graphic violence.

Criminal Use; Private Right of Action

New York

S 6301 

Commission to Study and Regulate AI and Robotics

Pending

Creates a temporary state commission to study and investigate how to regulate AI, robotics and automation; repeals such commission.

Studies; Oversight/Governance

New York

S 6471 

Use of Automated Decision Tools by Landlords

Pending

Relates to the use of automated decision tools by landlords for making housing decisions; sets conditions and rules for use of such tools.

Housing; Private Sector Use; Impact Assessment 

New York

S 6748 

Publications Using AI

Pending

Requires that every newspaper, magazine or other publication printed or electronically published in this state, which contains the use of generative AI or other information communication technology, shall identify that certain parts of such newspaper, magazine, or publication were composed through the use of AI or other information communication technology.

Private Sector Use

New York

S 6751 

Empire State Film Production Credit

Pending

Excludes a production using AI or autonomous vehicles in a manner which results in the displacement of employees whose salaries are qualified expenses from the definition of qualified film for the purposes of the empire state film production credit.

Private Sector Use; Effect on Labor/Employment; Taxes

New York

S 6953 

Use of AI Frontier Models

To Governor

Relates to the training and use of AI frontier models; defines terms; establishes remedies for violations.

Provenance; Private Sector Use; Criminal Use; Notification

New York

S 6954 

Generative AI Providers

Pending

Requires synthetic content creations system provider to apply provenance data, either directly or through the use of third-party technology, to synthetic content produced or modified by a synthetic content creations system that the synthetic content creations system provider makes available.

Provenance; Government Use; Criminal Use; Private Sector Use

New York

S 6955 

AI Training Data Transparency Act

Pending

Establishes the AI training data transparency act; requires developers of generative AI models or services to post on the developer's website information; regards the data used by the developer to train the generative AI model or service; includes a high-level summary of the datasets used in the development of such system or service.

Provenance; Impact Assessment; Effect on Labor/Employment; Government Use

New York

S 7033 

Algorithmic Pricing Discrimination Act

Pending

Enacts the preventing algorithmic pricing discrimination act; requires the disclosure of algorithmically set prices.

New York

S 7263 

Liability for Damages Caused By a Chatbot

Pending

Imposes liability for damages caused by a chatbot impersonating certain licensed professionals.

Criminal Use; Private Sector Use; Private Right of Action; Notification

New York

S 7599 

Automated Decision-Making by Government Agencies

To Governor

Amends the state technology law, the education law and the civil service law, in relation to automated decision-making by government agencies.

S 7691 

Artificial Intelligence Literacy Act

 

Pending

Establishes the AI Literacy Act which establishes an AI literacy in the digital equity competitive grant program.

Education Use; Education/Training; Appropriations; Oversight/Governance

New York

S 7882 

Residential Rental Dwelling Units

To Governor

Prohibits a person or entity from knowingly or with reckless disregard facilitate an agreement between or among two or more residential rental property owners or managers to not compete with respect to residential rental dwelling units, including by operating or licensing a software, data analytics service, or algorithmic device that performs a coordinating function on behalf of or between and among such residential rental property owners or managers.

Housing; Private Sector Use; Criminal Use

New York

S 7892 

Commissioner of Education

Pending

Directs the commissioner of education to make recommendations to the board of regents regarding the incorporation of instruction in AI system literacy into the school curriculum for junior and senior high schools; directs the board of regents to adopt guidelines if the curriculum is adopted.

Relates to the use of automated decision tools by banks for the purposes of making lending decisions.

Pending

Creates a computer science course requirement for graduation from high school; directs the department of education to design and implement such program.

S 8217 

Law Enforcement Agencies Staffed Hotline

Pending

Relates to requiring certain covered platforms to provide a process for law enforcement agencies to contact such platform and to comply with search warrants within seventy-two hours.

Artificial Intelligence Transparency for Journalism Act

Pending

Pending

Modifies the laws governing telephone solicitations to address robocalls.

Preventing Algorithmic Rent Fixing

Pending

Prevents algorithmic rent fixing in the rental housing market.

Rate Payer Protection Act

Pending

Prohibits passing any grid or energy costs incurred solely for serving data centers to rate payers; creates a special commission for data center planning.

North Carolina

H 1004 

Technology Hubs

Pending

Appropriates funds to establish AI hubs at select constituent institutions of the University of North Carolina; appropriates funds to establish technology hubs at each constituent institution of the University of North Carolina and for the state Collaboratory to establish a grant program for research projects on AI.

S 287 

Health Benefit Plans

Pending

Ensures that health benefit plan determinations of the medical necessity or appropriateness of healthcare services continue to be made by licensed and qualified healthcare providers.

S 315 

Utilization Reviews

Pending

Increases transparency and efficiency in utilization reviews.

S 316 

Lower Healthcare Costs

Pending

Lowers healthcare costs and increasing price transparency; relates to greater transparency in healthcare provider billing practices; relates to greater transparency in hospital and ambulatory surgical facility healthcare costs.

S 440 

Governors Budget

Pending

Makes base budget appropriations for current operations of state departments, institutions, and agencies, and for other purposes.

North Carolina

S 474 

The DAVE Act

Pending

Enacts the dave act by creating the division of accountability, value, and efficiency within the Department of State auditor, directing each state agency to report to the division on its use of public monies and the status of its vacant positions, and directing the division to assess the continued need of each state agency and the vacant positions within each state agency.

Government Use; Oversight/Governance

North Carolina

S 514 

Social Media Control

Pending

Combats social media addiction by requiring that social media platforms respect the privacy of North Carolina users' data and not use a North Carolina minor's data for advertising or algorithmic recommendations; appropriates funds for that purpose; makes willful violations of data user privacy an unfair practice under specified statutes.

S 530 

Agricultural Manufacturing

Pending

Provides for economic development incentives targeted for agricultural manufacturing.

H 1064 

National Council

Enacted

Relates to the national council for state authorization reciprocity agreements membership; relates to postsecondary education institution standards; repeals specified section relating to the authorization of a postsecondary educational institution not operating in this state.

Education Use; Education/Training; Personhood

North Dakota

H 1167 

AI Disclosure Statements

Enacted

Provides that any action taken for a political purpose, including communication and advertising in support of or opposition to a candidate, political committee, or a political party, or for the purpose of promoting passage or defeat of initiated or referred measures or petitions, containing images, graphics, videos, audio, text, or digital content created in whole or in part with the use of AI to visually or audibly impersonate a human, prominently must state the specified disclaimer.

Elections; Notification

North Dakota

H 1265 

State Information Technology Research Center

Failed

Relates to the state information technology research center, advanced technology review committee, compute credits grant program, and advanced technology grant fund; provides for a transfer; provides an appropriation.

Appropriations; Government Use; Education Use; Effect on Labor/Employment

North Dakota

H 1320 

Prohibiting Deepfake Videos and Images

Failed

Relates to prohibiting deepfake videos and images; provides a penalty.

Criminal Use

North Dakota

H 1386 

Computer Generated Images

Enacted

Relates to a prohibition on possessing certain computer generated images; provides that a person is guilty of a class C felony if, knowing of its character and content, that person knowingly possesses computer-generated image, that includes sexual conduct by a minor; provides that an individual violating this section is guilty of a class B felony if the offense involved twenty or more images and the offense involved sadistic or masochistic conduct or other depictions of violence.

Criminal Use; Child Pornography

North Dakota

H 1410 

Legislative Management Study

Enacted

Provides that, during the specified interim, the Legislative Management shall consider studying State laws relating to criminal conduct against children, child sexual abuse, child physical abuse, child neglect, and human trafficking of children; provides that the study must include a review of, among other things, the use of the term child sexually abusive material instead of the term sexual performance to describe child pornography or sexual conduct of a minor.

Studies; Child Pornography

North Dakota

H 1429 

Harassment and Stalking with a Robot

Enacted

Relates to harassment and stalking with a robot; provides a penalty; relates to an artificial object or system that senses, processes, and acts using technology, including the associated elements, communication links, and AI.

Criminal Use

North Dakota

H 1448 

Advanced Technology Review Committee

Enacted

Relates to the advanced technology review committee, advanced technology grant program, and advanced technology grant fund; provides for a transfer; provides an appropriation.

Appropriations; Education Use; Education/Training; Government Use; Private Sector Use; Effect on Labor/Employment

North Dakota

H 1613 

Law Enforcement Use of a Drone or Robot

Enacted

Relates to law enforcement use of a robot; provides that a law enforcement agency may not authorize the use of a robot to deploy a lethal weapon, unless the weapon is controlled remotely, cannot be activated autonomously, and is used to neutralize an inanimate object at risk of exploding or causing an immediate threat to public safety or property, among other things.

Government Use

North Dakota

S 2186 

Removal or Withholding of a Child

Enacted

Relates to interference with court-ordered parenting time; creates a child custody review task force; provides for a legislative management report; provides a penalty.

Judicial Use; Studies

North Dakota

S 2256 

Research Technology Park Fund

Enacted

Relates to a research technology park fund; provides a continuing appropriation; provides a transfer; provides a report.

North Dakota

S 2278 

Legislative Management Study

Enacted

Provides a legislative management study relating to the retention of library materials.

Ohio

H 96 

Operating Appropriations

Enacted

Includes AI appropriations. Requires the department of education and workforce to develop a model policy on the use of AI in schools. The model policy shall address appropriate use of AI by students and staff for educational purposes.

Ohio

H 106 

Enact Alyssas Law

Pending

Enacts Alyssa's Law to establish a pilot grant program for public and chartered nonpublic schools to purchase panic alert systems or contract for AI firearm detection software and to make an appropriation.

H 362 

Regulate Fraudulent Synthetic Media

Pending

Regulates the dissemination of deceptive and fraudulent synthetic media for the purpose of influencing the results of an election.

Ohio

HCR 16 

Strengthening and Deepening Sister State Relationship

Pending

Reaffirms state's commitment to strengthening and deepening its sister-state relationship with Taiwan; urges all state businesses to refer to Taiwan, the Republic of China, as Taiwan, opposing the People's Republic of China's misuse of United Nations Resolution 2758; continues its support for Taiwan's meaningful participation in international organizations that impact the health, safety, and well-being of the people of Taiwan.

HR 11 

 

Pending

Urges the state to expand the manufacturing of domestic drones to ensure competitiveness and national security against the increased presence of Chinese-manufactured drones.

S 79 

 

Pending

Regulates the use of pricing algorithms.

Schools

Override Pending

Relates to schools; relates to subject matter standards; adds certain unit of personal financial literacy to required curriculum units; requires unit to be taken in certain grades; allows certain Advanced Placement courses to fulfill certain requirements; requires certain math courses to be above a certain rigor; removes language requiring completion of certain personal financial literacy passport; allows issuance of an alternate diploma to certain students; relates to aviation.

H 1537

Elections

Rhode Island

H 5985 

The State Life Science Hub Act

Enacted

Makes technical amendments to the Rhode Island life science hub regarding the terms of the directors, advisory committees, powers, disposition of hub assets upon termination, and tax status as a governmental unit which is a separate legal entity from the state; provides amendments would make the hub, its property, and its bonds exempt from federal, state and local taxes and would authorize the hub to form venture capital funds and nonprofits to accept donations for the hub's purposes.

Health Use; Government Use; Private Sector Use

Rhode Island

S 8 

Rules of the Senate

Adopted

Amends the Rules of the Senate for the specified years; provides that the Senate shall have the specified standing committees, including, among others, the Committee on Labor and Gaming and the Committee on AI and Emerging Technologies; provides that it shall be the duty of the Committee on AI and Emerging Technologies to consider all legislation and matters relating to the creation, use, and regulation of AI and emerging technologies.

S 627 

Regulatory Provisions on AI Act

Pending

Establishes regulations to ensure the ethical development, integration, and deployment of high-risk AI systems, particularly those influencing consequential decisions in areas like employment, education, lending, housing, healthcare, and legal services. Requires developers, integrators, and deployers to use reasonable care to prevent algorithmic discrimination, implement risk management policies, conduct regular impact assessments, and provide transparency.

Offense of Intentionally Disseminating Intimate Images

South Carolina

H 3404 

Property Right in Use of Individuals Name

Pending - Carryover

Provides that every individual has a property right in the use of that individual's name, photograph, voice, or likeness in any medium in any manner and provides penalties.

South Carolina

H 3517 

Deepfake Media Distribution

Pending - Carryover

Prohibits the distribution of deceptive and fraudulent deepfake media of a candidate within ninety days of an election unless the media includes requisite disclosure language; authorizes a candidate whose likeness is depicted in media distributed in violation of this section to seek injunctive or other equitable relief as well as an action for damages against the distributor of the media.

H 4346 

 

Adopted

South Carolina

H 4509 

 

Pending - Carryover

Memorializes the president of the United States and the United States Congress to express a sincere apology to the Vatican and members of the Catholic church for the depiction and dissemination of images of the president appearing dressed as the pope.

 

South Carolina

S 72 

Distribution of Intimate Images

Pending - Carryover

Provides definitions relates to the distribution of intimate images; makes it unlawful for a person to intentionally disseminate an intimate image or a digitally forged intimate image of another person without effective consent of the depicted person; provides a penalty for the unlawful dissemination of intimate images.
